introSection: Familieachtbaan (Dutch for Family rollercoaster) is a Tube Coaster by ABC Rides, located at Billybird Park Hemelrijk in Volker, North Brabant, Netherlands.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is energy neutral, using solar panels on top of a tower, which houses the boarding station.

fullText:
Familieachtbaan (Dutch for Family rollercoaster) is a Tube Coaster by ABC Rides, located at Billybird Park Hemelrijk in Volker, North Brabant, Netherlands.

The ride is energy neutral, using solar panels on top of a tower, which houses the boarding station.
